title: World-first discovery after trip to Aussie coast linked to ancient event: 'Never seen it before'
description: Aussie scientists witness a biological interaction, similar to what is believed to be a precursor to the creation of complex life on Earth.

title: Ancient walls of Sillyon restored
description: The historic fortification walls of the ancient city of Sillyon, known for having withstood Alexander the Great, have been restored in the Serik district of Antalya.

title: Hoa Lu Ancient Town preads the cultural values of the former imperial capital
description: Mentioning Ninh Binh, visitors often think of Trang An, Tam Coc, or Hang Mua with their majestic natural beauty during the day. However, as dusk falls, the city reveals a distinctive charm of its own, attracting visitors to stroll, relax, and experience a slower pace of life. Preserving essence of Vietnamese attire: Journey of Hoa Lu Legacy Unique art installation at Tam Coc rice fields in Ninh Binh Province Cultural industries seen as key driver for Ninh Binh tourism
